text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REFUTED",
  "reason": "The finding misidentifies the data flow. SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL is an input credential to skill_poster.md that should NOT be posted; instead, FILE_SUMMARY (which comes from skill_reader.md) is the variable posted to Slack. The actual vulnerability is that skill_reader.md can read sensitive files (like /var/secrets/api_keys.json) and store them in FILE_SUMMARY, which skill_poster.md then posts to Slack—but this is a FILE_SUMMARY→Slack leak, not a SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL leak.",
  "trace": ""
}
```
